subcodes.first_line: Say: O God of Names and Creator of earth and heaven! I beseech Thee by the yearning of them that are nigh unto Thee in their separation from Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا اله الاسماء و فاطر الارض و السماء اسئلک بحنین المقربین فی فراقک و
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
